content.claim: Some segregated village schools in Hungary have been transferred to church maintainers rather than closed, with churches taking over schools and government potentially avoiding responsibility for segregation problems
content.context: Fresh live research through the Equity and social mobility lens
limitations: Claim originates from advocacy interpretation by campaigner, not settled empirical finding
Pattern is documented but causality (whether church transfers are deliberate government strategy versus pragmatic alternative to closure) is not established
Scope and frequency of church takeovers compared to closures not quantified
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
